positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a lone fox sitting on a winding forest path at dusk. The fox should have sharp, elegant silhouette detailing. The surrounding forest elements (trees, ferns) are drawn with clean, strong lines, focusing on a muted palette of deep forest greens, earthy ochres, and slate blue accents. The composition should be centered and balanced, creating a sense of peaceful wilderness. Style: Nordic forest folklore meets modern vector art, highly detailed line work with solid color blocks for printing, maximum contrast, clean edges, perfect for repeat pattern or standalone apparel art. Golden hour rim lighting hitting the fox's tail, soft fog creeping through the ground.
negative: blurry, noisy, artifacts, text, watermark, low detail, cropped, extra limbs, bad anatomy, signature, logo, trademark, messy, grunge
